name: example-simple-deck
title: Slide Deck Starter
description: General-purpose slide-deck framework with a proven 1920×1080 canvas, reusable layouts, navigation, print behavior, and overflow checks.

description_i18n.en: General-purpose slide-deck framework with a proven 1920×1080 canvas, reusable layouts, navigation, print behavior, and overflow checks.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 通用幻灯片框架，内置经过验证的 1920×1080 画布、可复用版式、导航、打印行为与溢出检查。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 通用投影片框架，內建經過驗證的 1920×1080 畫布、可重用版式、導覽、列印行為與溢出檢查。

query.en: Create a polished {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}. Speaker notes: {{speakerNotes}}. Use {{designSystem}} and treat the user's brief as the source of truth. Ask only for missing essentials: audience, decision target, source materials, deadline, and must-keep facts. Then produce the slide plan, written slides, visual direction, speaker-ready structure, and an overflow-safe critic pass. Build from `assets/template.html` and the layouts in `references/layouts.md`.
query.zh-CN: 围绕 {{topic}}，为 {{audience}} 制作一份精致的 {{deckType}}，共 {{slideCount}}。演讲者备注：{{speakerNotes}}。使用 {{designSystem}}，并以用户需求为唯一事实来源。只补问缺失的受众、决策目标、素材、截止时间和必须保留的事实；然后输出页面规划、逐页文案、视觉方向、可演讲结构与防溢出自检。基于 `assets/template.html` 和 `references/layouts.md` 中的版式生成。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: AI operations platform for modern support teams

inputs.name: designSystem
inputs.label: Design system
inputs.placeholder: Swiss, Linear, editorial, or active project design system
